final_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a room viewed from slightly left of center. The wall is painted soft light blue with a matte finish, appearing darker in low night light. On the right side of the wall, there is a large multi-pane window with a thin white frame divided into rectangular panes, revealing a dark night sky dotted with faint stars. A shallow white windowsill runs the full width of the window. Positioned on the extreme left end of the windowsill is a small white rectangular pot, about 20cm tall, containing a green plant with broad oval leaves and pointed tips, now softly silhouetted against the dark window. Sheer white curtains hang from a rod above the window, with the right panel drawn slightly open. The floor is covered in large smooth white tiles, dimly visible in the low light. In the foreground, slightly right of center on the floor, lies a single small green leaf. The room is illuminated by soft, cool moonlight filtering through the window, casting pale blue shadows across the floor and wall. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors. Frame composition: the left third contains the plant on the left windowsill, the center is dominated by the window, and the right third has the curtain on the far right edge. Spatial layout: light blue wall with window on the RIGHT side, white curtain on the far RIGHT edge, white pot with green plant on the LEFT windowsill, white floor in FOREGROUND with a small green leaf on the RIGHT side. Surface materials: matte light blue wall, smooth white floor tiles, ceramic white pot, smooth green plant leaves, sheer white curtain fabric.

Step 2: Infer counterfactual change: the instruction implies a shift from daytime to late night, so the sky changes from bright blue with clouds to dark night sky, and lighting changes from sunlight to moonlight, altering the entire atmosphere.

Step 3: Derive expected visual outcome: all physical objects remain identical in position, material, and shape, but the scene becomes dark with moonlight; the wall appears darker, the window reveals a starry sky, shadows are soft and blue-toned, and colors are muted.
